TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tsai_Ing-wen, title = Tsai_Ing-wen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tsai_Ing-wen} }

S.FORM: Tsai Ing-wen(lalu na plmukan'蔡英文', lalu na Paywang'Tjuku', ryax sa 31 na byacing tay 8 squ kawas na 1956 - squ ) hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. mrhuw Taywan ta' misuw hya' ga Tsai Ing-wen, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Tsai Ing-wen(lalu na plmukan'蔡英文', lalu na Paywang'Tjuku', ryax sa 31 na byacing tay 8 squ kawas na 1956 - squ ) hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. mrhuw Taywan ta' misuw hya' ga Tsai Ing-wen, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ts~ɕai iŋ-wen(lalu na plmukanʔ***ʔ, lalu na pajwaŋʔtjukuʔ, rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu ) ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. mrħuw tajwan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ts~ɕai iŋ-wen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
